title.en: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Noble Around Ari

summary.th: ขาย: 1 นอน 35 ตร.ม. ราคา 7,600,000 บาท (DotProperty #ea2fd927c131-75b0-0992-3c5e-7068a089)

description.en:
Noble Around Ari – 2-min walk to BTS | Top Floor 38F
Project: Noble Around Ari (Phahonyothin Soi 7)Distance: ~2 minutes’ walk (90 m) to BTS AriUnit: 1 Bedroom, 1 Bathroom, 35 sq.m. | Top Floor (38th) – the highest floor with the best panoramic city viewStatus: Brand-new, never rented For Rent: THB 30,000 / month (1-year contract) Inside the unit – Fully Furnished & Fully Equipped

Separate kitchen with fridge, microwave, stove & range hood
Washer, Smart TV, sofa, coffee table, bed & mattress
2 air-conditioners
Bathroom with water heater
Digital door lock

 

Building Features
6 passenger elevators + 1 service elevator
Lobby X Uptown Sky Lounge
The Mezzanine Library (2nd floor)
Rooftop garden 23rd-floor
Sky Lounge (≈350 sq.m.)
with multiple zones: tea room, co-kitchen counter, game zone & outdoor seating Dimension
Pool and 360-degree saltwater pool
@ 39th floor Horizontal
Gym / 360-degree Fitness Centre Parking spaces, 24/7 security, key-card access
 
Location Highlights
2-minute walk to BTS
→ super convenient commute to Siam Paragon, Central Ladprao, Victory Monument, Chatuchak Surrounded by La Villa Ari, Villa Market, cafés, restaurants, co-working spaces Upscale,

description.en:
Property Details

1 Bedroom Plus
41.6 sq.m.
12th Floor
Fully Furnished
Complete Electrical Appliances
Brand New Unit
Ready to Move In

Unit Highlights

Flexible 1 Bedroom Plus layout that can be converted into a second bedroom or a home office to suit your lifestyle
East-facing unit with pleasant morning sunlight
Faces the rear of the project, offering a quiet and private living environment
No afternoon sun
Minimal noise from the BTS

Location

Only 90 meters from BTS Ari
Convenient access to restaurants, cafés, shopping malls, and office buildings in the Ari neighborhood

description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


Fully furnished 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom condo for rent / sale with a floorsize of 26.54 squaremeters, located on the 36th floor, at
Noble Around Ari building, in the popular Phaya Thai district near BTS Ari. Please contact us to schedule a viewing.

Unit amenities:
 * Balcony
 * Microwave
 * Refrigerator
 * TV

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2023
 * Covered car park
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Security cameras
 * Beautiful garden area on premise




Haven’t found a place you love yet?

Contact us today and let us find you the most suitable home or investment property for a great price - at no cost to you.
